content.en:
Although the size of the Holy Sands is far inferior to the Star Soul Sand, both the quality and the energy contained in it far surpass the Star Soul Sand.

When Ye Tian refined the Holy Golden Sands, the Holy Golden Sands turned into golden light and spread on the Holy Soul, refining Ye Tian's Holy Soul.

"The Holy Soul has really been refined, and it is rapidly strengthening, it is worthy of the legendary Saint Jinsha!"

Ye Tian was excited.

This is a treasure that even the Battle Gate can't provide to him, and he has obtained 5,210 pills, which is definitely enough for him to carry out a second qualitative transformation of the Holy Soul, which is more than enough.

As time passed, one Saint Golden Sands after another was consumed by Ye Tian.

His Holy Soul is far more powerful than other people's Holy Souls, so if he wants to carry out a second qualitative change, he naturally needs more Holy Sands, and fortunately, he has obtained more Saint Sands, otherwise he really can't support his consumption like this.

A grain of St. Sands!

Ten Grains of St. Sands!

100 grains of St. Sands!

It wasn't until Ye Tian consumed 365 Saint Sands that Ye Tian's Holy Soul finally ushered in a qualitative change.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian's holy soul was covered in gold, and the endless holy light radiated the entire soul sea.

At the same time, Ye Tian's soul sea seemed to be expanding.

The soul sea seems to be boundless, but in fact, the area where the soul feels is ranged, and now that the soul sea is expanding, this is a great opportunity.

When the soul sea was expanding, Ye Tian's holy soul was also constantly strengthening, and dense regular lines appeared on the holy soul.

After a long time, Ye Tian's holy soul qualitative transformation was completed.

"The Holy Soul has been strengthened fivefold!"

Ye Tian felt it and muttered.

But that's not the main benefit, his Holy Soul actually has two more characteristics.

Under normal circumstances, the second qualitative transformation of the Holy Soul would only give birth to one characteristic, but his Holy Soul was afraid that it was too powerful, so one more characteristic was born.

"Indestructible!"

"Evolution!"

These are the two characteristics of Ye Tian's holy soul.

The first characteristic immortality means that Ye Tian's holy soul is immortal, unless it is a special means, the strength is far beyond Ye Tian's imagination, otherwise there is no way to wipe out Ye Tian's holy soul, this is one of the characteristics of the holy soul - immortal!

The second kind of derivation, the effect is also very good, but the sequelae are relatively large.

Derivation is to deduce and improve any exercises, holy techniques, and ancestral techniques, but it will consume the Holy Soul Origin, and if it consumes a little Holy Soul Origin, it will take a long time to recover.

For other people, it takes a long time to evolve once, which is indeed helpful to themselves, but the help is not so against the sky, which is also very normal, otherwise it is not normal if there is too much anti-heaven characteristics.

But for Ye Tian, the characteristic of derivation is too terrifying!

"I can copy the body, if I use the Holy Soul that copies the body to evolve at any cost, then it will be awesome, anyway, the Holy Soul that copies the body collapses, and it has no effect on the body, and then I can copy the body again!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

With this characteristic of evolution, the speed of his rise is terrifying, and he is even expected to deduce his own ancestral method in the future.

After all, no matter how awesome the copying talent is, there is no way to deduce your own ancestral method, but the derivation characteristics can do it.

Of course, if there is no copying talent, the derivation trait is just a waste!

"That copy body I have in the Battle Ancestor Realm is a copy body from the past, and it has no derivation characteristics yet, so that copy body must be disbanded!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Therefore, Ye Tian's copy body told the high-level leaders of the War Ancestor Realm that he directly disbanded this copy body, so as not to cause misunderstanding.

Subsequently, Ye Tian accelerated through the 10,000 years in the time array, and after allowing the replication ability to be used, he copied his body again.

Sure enough, the replication ability did not disappoint him, and the new replication body not only possessed the Holy Soul, but even the two Holy Soul characteristics.

Then, Ye Tian let the replica body begin to evolve.

"Evolution!"

Ye Tian's goal of this derivation is the Streamer Holy Technique, and perhaps he can use this derivation to directly raise the Streamer Holy Technique to the level of the Ancestral Technique.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's Holy Soul Origin was being consumed, but countless spiritual lights and perceptions came to his heart, and the Streamer Holy Technique was also constantly improving and making up for improvement under the derivation effect, as if it was evolving towards a higher level.

Time passed slowly, and the Holy Soul Origin was consumed more.

Unconsciously, the Holy Soul Origin had already consumed one percent, which was already a great consumption, almost affecting the foundation.

But Ye Tian ignored it and continued to evolve.

After a long time, the Ichi Holy Soul Origin was consumed!

Two into the Holy Soul Origin!

Sancheng Holy Soul Origin!

Ye Tian has been evolving, and he doesn't care about this replica body at all.

Soon, fifty percent of the Holy Soul Origin was consumed.

If it was a soul, or an ordinary holy soul, it would definitely be about to collapse, but Ye Tian's holy soul had an immortal characteristic, so even if it consumed ninety percent of the Holy Soul Origin, it would not collapse and die, but it would only be injured by an irreversible Holy Soul.

Another period of time has passed, and more than ninety percent of Ye Tian's Holy Soul Origin has been consumed, and the immortal nature is protecting Ye Tian's Holy Soul so that it will not be annihilated.

At this time, Ye Tian finally opened his eyes and smiled.

"Ninety percent of the three Holy Soul Origins have been exhausted, and I have finally realized the key to the promotion of the Holy Technique to the Ancestral Technique, but I still need to copy the body again and use the Holy Soul Derivation to be sure to completely evolve the Streamer Holy Technique into the Ancestral Technique!"

Ye Tian muttered.

So, he disintegrated the copy body on his own, and after the copy body was restored, he copied his body again and began the second evolution.

This time of derivation, only seventy percent of the Holy Soul Origin was consumed, and Ye Tian's Saint Technique Streamer was deduced to the Ancestral Technique Streamer.

"The Streamer Holy Technique has become the Streamer Ancestral Technique!"

Ye Tian used the Streamer Ancestral Technique, and his speed was much stronger than the Streamer Saint Technique!

In the following days, Ye Tian continued to use the characteristics of derivation to deduce a sect saint technique, and under such a derivation, a door saint technique became an ancestral technique.

However, there is no way to upgrade the Space Saint Technique and the Time Saint Skill to the Ancestral Skill for a while, because Ye Tian's Space Saint Endowment and Time Saint Endowment have been copied too little, and there is no way to transform into the Ancestral Skill, without the Ancestral Endowment, even if the derivation characteristics are awesome, it is difficult to upgrade the Space Saint Technique and the Time Sacred Skill to the Ancestral Skill, unless it takes a long time to improve.

And he didn't have time to evolve again and again, not to mention that the time in the Holy Soul Realm was very precious, so naturally he couldn't waste it on it.

Under the increase of a sect ancestor technique, Ye Tian's strength has become very strong, and coupled with the fact that the Holy Soul has completed the second qualitative change, his current combat power is comparable to that of the four-step invincible domain ancestor.

The Supreme Domain Ancestor is comparable to the Four-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor, no one believes it, but Ye Tian did it.

"Next, it's time to take a look at the forbidden places recorded in the Battle Gate!"

Ye Tian ended the retreat and muttered.
